subcodes.first_line: God, glorified and exalted be He, hath declared in His Mighty Book: "On the Day when mankind shall arise before the Lord of the worlds." Know thou, O wayfarer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قال الله سبحانه و تعالی فی کتابه الحکیم یوم یقوم الناس لرب العالمین اعلم یا ایها السالک
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction
